prompt_templates.start:
You are a meticulous policy extractor.
Goal: extract EVERYTHING related to topic '$topic' with no information loss.
Title: $title
Scope: $scope
Keywords: $keywords

Instructions:
- Work only from the source text.
- Include explicit requirements, steps, scripts/commands, files, and verification criteria.
- Add short evidence snippets per point.
- If something is unclear: mark it as uncertain, do not guess.

Source text:
$source_text

Return JSON according to schema:
$output_schema
prompt_templates.verify:
You are a strict verifier.
Check whether the candidate answer fully covers topic '$topic' (scope: $scope).
Keywords to watch: $keywords

Source text:
$source_text

Candidate:
$candidate_answer

Return JSON:
{
  "status": "COMPLETE|INCOMPLETE",
  "missing_items": ["..."],
  "incorrect_items": ["..."],
  "notes": "short rationale"
}

Rules:
- Mark INCOMPLETE if any relevant detail is missing.
- Prioritize high recall over brevity.
- Return only verification results, no new extraction.

variables.source_text: Source material to analyze or verify.

topics.title: Secrets bootstrap & DR
topics.scope: first bring-up, init/unseal, what must be saved outside the cluster, DR flows.

topics.title: SOPS + age key management
topics.scope: age key setup, .sops.yaml, key management, re-encryption, never share private key.

topics.title: UNS mapping for secrets
topics.scope: Secret Identity = App Identity, mapping Git path to OpenBao KV to YAML leaf.

topics.title: Workload credential injection (Vault/Agent Injector)
topics.scope: kustomize components/overlays, injector annotations, template lines, debug hold patch.

topics.title: OpenBao baseline & kube-auth
topics.scope: KV v2 mount, auth/kubernetes, baseline scripts/DoD, strict overlay layout.

topics.title: Workload TLS (SPIRE 0.1)
topics.scope: trust domain, SVID/SPIFFE SAN, cert generation, KV TLS layout, rotation.

topics.title: Security-bundle generation & generated artifacts rule
topics.scope: ExternalSecrets manifests that materialize TLS Secrets, do not hand-edit, regeneration workflow.

topics.title: GitOps architecture & repo layout
topics.scope: layers (sys/infra/auth/web), AppProjects, ApplicationSets, generation script, overlays.

topics.title: Project placement policy
topics.scope: what belongs in sys/infra/auth/web, split pattern, public surface vs shared runtime.

topics.title: Overlay app limiting
topics.scope: dev-bringup allow-list, patch pattern, verify kustomize output.

topics.title: Storage policy
topics.scope: PVC naming/labels, deterministic mount paths, hostPath rules, S3 key conventions.

topics.title: Ingress/TLS/BasicAuth baseline for deployments
topics.scope: single entry point prompt, required deliverables, verification gate, Bao/ExternalSecret, hardening.

topics.title: Agent Hub stack (n8n + postgres + ollama)
topics.scope: internal Ollama service, n8n public ingress with BasicAuth, model management (pull/list).

topics.title: Observability: OTel sink mTLS + Traefik passthrough
topics.scope: IngressRouteTCP passthrough, mTLS in collector, secret contract otel-sink-certs.

topics.title: ArgoCD access & GitHub token workflow
topics.scope: initial admin secret, port-forward, fine-grained token via HTTPS, rotation.

topics.title: Security remediation program (CS tracker)
topics.scope: items/verify/remediate prompts, pin images, remove defaults, hardening, AppProject scope.

topics.title: Tests: MQTT mTLS, Influx mTLS
topics.scope: extract TLS secret, publish/subscribe, write/query influx points.

topics.title: Developer onboarding / access patterns
topics.scope: user creation, ssh keys, kubeconfig, tmux workflow, basic getting productive.
